name: Chocolate Florentine Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House chocolate morsels (11.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in oats, sugar, flour, corn syrup, milk, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
3. Drop the batter by measuring teaspoonfuls onto foil-lined cookie sheets, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
4. Bake for 5-7 minutes. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets before removing the foil.
5. Melt NESTLE Toll House chocolate morsels over hot (not boiling) water until smooth. Spread the melted chocolate on one side of half the cookies and top with the remaining cookies.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen sandwich cookies.
